events.title: Godsmack & Stone Temple Pilots — with Dorothy
events.story: "The Rise of Rock World Tour" pairs two of the genre's heaviest-hitting headliners on one bill, with Dorothy opening. This is the amphitheater's marquee date for the week — lawn seats have been the value play on this tour, with the venue's usual pre-show tailgate scene in the lots from 5 PM.

events.title: The Beths
events.story: The New Zealand indie favorites land at The Pageant on the back of glowing reviews for their latest record. Tight harmonies, sharp hooks, and one of the more reliably great rooms in the city for a band this size.

events.title: Bruce Bruce — Saturday Double Set
events.address: 1151 St. Louis Galleria, Richmond Heights, MO

events.title: Akaash Singh
events.address: 1151 St. Louis Galleria, Richmond Heights, MO
events.story: Akaash Singh opens a four-show weekend run at Helium — his last visit sold out every slot, and a second late show was added within a day. If comedy is the plan this week, this is the one to book first.

events.title: Stokley Williams — with Kool Moe Dee
events.story: The voice and drummer behind Mint Condition shares the bill with hip-hop pioneer Kool Moe Dee — a rare pairing of golden-era soul and old-school rap on the same stage at The Pageant.

events.title: Akaash Singh — Friday Late Show
events.address: 1151 St. Louis Galleria, Richmond Heights, MO

events.title: Dance Gavin Dance — with Horse the Band, Wolf & Bear, The Novelists
events.story: A stacked four-band post-hardcore bill that's been selling out rooms this size on the rest of the run. Early doors, long night — get there for the openers.

events.title: Akaash Singh — Saturday Early Show
events.address: 1151 St. Louis Galleria, Richmond Heights, MO
